scripts.install:all: npm --prefix gatewayserver install && npm --prefix cartservice install && npm --prefix productservice install && npm --prefix identityservice install && npm --prefix orderservice install && npm --prefix paymentservice install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:cart" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:identity" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:frontend"
